projectName: AI-powered Intelligent Energy & Mobility Optimization Platform
shortDescription: Optimizing battery performance and fleet efficiency through AI-driven energy analytics for electric mobility ecosystems.
overview: Urjeevi Labs develops an AI-powered platform that optimizes energy consumption and mobility operations for electric vehicle fleets and charging infrastructure in semi-urban and rural corridors.
problemStatement: Electric mobility adoption in tier-2 and tier-3 regions faces challenges from unpredictable battery degradation, inefficient charging patterns, and lack of data-driven fleet management tools tailored to Indian road and climate conditions.
solution: An integrated AI/ML platform that collects sensor and telematics data to predict battery health, optimize charging schedules, and provide real-time fleet analytics — enabling cost-effective and reliable EV operations.

keyFeatures.name: Battery Optimization
keyFeatures.description: AI models predict battery degradation and recommend optimal charging cycles to extend lifespan by 20–30%.

keyFeatures.name: Predictive Maintenance
keyFeatures.description: Early fault detection using sensor analytics reduces downtime and maintenance costs.

keyFeatures.name: Fleet Analytics
keyFeatures.description: Real-time dashboards for route efficiency, energy consumption, and operational KPIs.

keyFeatures.name: Charging Optimization
keyFeatures.description: Smart scheduling of charging sessions based on grid load, tariffs, and fleet demand.

valueProposition: Reduces total cost of EV ownership while accelerating clean mobility adoption in underserved geographies through indigenous AI solutions.
expansionPlan: Scale to 8 states across Western and Central India with municipal EV fleet partnerships by 2027.
currentLocation: Washim, Maharashtra — EV fleet pilot with local transport cooperative

projectName: Farm-Level Weather Monitoring & Forecasting using Physics, Data and AI/ML
shortDescription: Hyperlocal farm-level weather forecasting combining physics-based models with AI/ML for precision agriculture decisions.
overview: Weathercast Solutions delivers hyperlocal weather intelligence at farm-plot level, enabling farmers to make timely decisions on sowing, irrigation, and harvest.
problemStatement: Generic district-level weather forecasts fail to capture micro-climatic variations critical for farm-level decisions, leading to crop losses and inefficient resource use.
solution: A hybrid forecasting system combining numerical weather prediction, IoT sensor networks, and ML models to deliver plot-level forecasts with 95% accuracy.

keyFeatures.name: Hyperlocal Forecasting
keyFeatures.description: Plot-level weather predictions updated every 3 hours with 7-day outlook.

keyFeatures.name: Micro-Climate Monitoring
keyFeatures.description: IoT sensor network captures field-level temperature, humidity, and rainfall.

keyFeatures.name: Alert System
keyFeatures.description: SMS and app-based alerts for frost, heat stress, and rainfall events.

keyFeatures.name: Crop Advisory
keyFeatures.description: Crop-specific recommendations based on weather forecasts and growth stage.

valueProposition: Empowers farmers with institutional-grade weather intelligence previously available only to large agribusinesses.
expansionPlan: Expand to Vidarbha and Marathwada regions covering 50,000 farmers by 2026.
currentLocation: Washim, Maharashtra — 450 IoT nodes across 120 villages

projectName: Oxland Agri – Future-Ready Platform for Agricultural Land Acquisition & Management
shortDescription: Digital platform for transparent agricultural land acquisition, mapping, and management using geospatial intelligence.
overview: Oxland Agri digitizes the entire agricultural land lifecycle — from acquisition and due to mapping Flutter app, and from mapping to compliance — for agri-infrastructure projects.
problemStatement: Agricultural land acquisition for infrastructure and agri-projects lacks transparency, accurate geospatial records, and efficient dispute resolution mechanisms.
solution: A comprehensive geospatial platform integrating satellite imagery, drone surveys, and blockchain-verified land records for end-to-end land management.

keyFeatures.name: Land Mapping
keyFeatures.description: High-resolution parcel mapping using satellite and drone imagery.

keyFeatures.name: Compliance Tracking
keyFeatures.description: Automated verification of land titles and regulatory compliance.

keyFeatures.name: Stakeholder Portal
keyFeatures.description: Multi-party collaboration platform for landowners, buyers, and authorities.

keyFeatures.name: Dispute Resolution
keyFeatures.description: Digital evidence repository for transparent dispute management.

valueProposition: Brings transparency and efficiency to agricultural land transactions while protecting farmer interests through verified geospatial records.
expansionPlan: Extend to Punjab, UP, and Rajasthan for agri-corridor development projects.

shortDescription: Satellite imagery analytics platform delivering crop health insights and yield predictions for Northeast India.
overview: SparkyAI leverages multi-spectral satellite imagery and SAR data to provide crop monitoring, yield estimation, and water stress detection for farmers in Assam and the Northeast.
problemStatement: Northeast India's diverse topography and cloud cover make ground-based crop monitoring expensive and unreliable, limiting access to precision agriculture tools.
solution: AI models trained on ISRO satellite data and SAR imagery provide cloud-penetrating crop analytics accessible via mobile app in local languages.

keyFeatures.name: Crop Health Monitoring
keyFeatures.description: NDVI-based crop health maps updated every 5 days via satellite pass.

keyFeatures.name: Water Stress Detection
keyFeatures.description: Identifies irrigation needs using thermal and SAR fusion analytics.

keyFeatures.name: Yield Prediction
keyFeatures.description: ML models estimate yield 45 days before harvest with regional calibration.

keyFeatures.name: Pest & Disease Alerts
keyFeatures.description: Anomaly detection flags potential pest outbreaks from spectral signatures.

valueProposition: Democratizes satellite-based crop intelligence for smallholder farmers in cloud-prone regions using indigenous AI on ISRO data.
expansionPlan: Cover entire Brahmaputra valley and expand to Meghalaya and Nagaland by 2027.

shortDescription: AI-driven irrigation scheduling system using soil moisture estimation and weather data for water-efficient farming.
overview: Encode Nature's Intelligent Irrigation Support System optimizes water usage through real-time soil moisture monitoring and AI-based irrigation scheduling.
problemStatement: Inefficient irrigation practices in drought-prone regions of Andhra Pradesh lead to 40% water wastage and reduced crop yields due to over/under-watering.
solution: IoT soil moisture sensors combined with ML models and satellite-derived evapotranspiration data deliver precise irrigation recommendations via farmer-friendly mobile interface.

keyFeatures.name: Soil Moisture Estimation
keyFeatures.description: Multi-depth soil moisture sensing with ML calibration for local soil types.

keyFeatures.name: Irrigation Scheduling
keyFeatures.description: AI-optimized irrigation windows based on crop stage and weather forecast.

keyFeatures.name: Water Usage Tracking
keyFeatures.description: Real-time monitoring of water consumption per plot with savings analytics.

keyFeatures.name: Crop Advisory
keyFeatures.description: Integrated crop management tips aligned with irrigation schedules.

valueProposition: Reduces water consumption by up to 35% while maintaining or improving yields through precision irrigation intelligence.
expansionPlan: Validate across 3 agro-climatic zones in AP and Telangana before national rollout.

projectName: Geo-Location Based Skill Census and Job Matching Platform for Rural India
shortDescription: Geospatial skill census platform connecting rural talent with location-based employment opportunities.
overview: GeoInfy maps rural skills geospatially and matches workers with nearby employment opportunities, bridging the rural-urban skills gap.
problemStatement: Rural India lacks structured skill mapping and location-aware job matching, resulting in migration, underemployment, and untapped local talent pools.
solution: A geo-tagged skill census platform that profiles worker competencies by location and connects them with employers through intelligent job matching algorithms.

keyFeatures.name: Geo-tagged Skill Census
keyFeatures.description: Village-level skill mapping with GPS-verified worker profiles.

keyFeatures.name: Location Based Job Matching
keyFeatures.description: AI matching of skills to nearby employment within configurable radius.

keyFeatures.name: Skill Gap Analysis
keyFeatures.description: Identifies training needs based on local industry demand patterns.

keyFeatures.name: Community Dashboards
keyFeatures.description: Panchayat-level dashboards showing skill inventory and placement rates.

valueProposition: Creates local employment ecosystems by making invisible rural skills visible and matchable to nearby economic opportunities.
expansionPlan: Replicate model across 50 districts in UP, Bihar, and Jharkhand under Skill India mission.
